query:
SELECT a.id, a.code, a.categoryId, ac.name as categoryName, a.acquisitionDate,
  rp.effectiveDate as planEffectiveDate, rp.endDate as planEndDate, rp.qtyPerHeadPerDay,
  fi.name as feedItem, ph.pricePerUnit, ph.effectiveDate as priceEffectiveDate
FROM animals a
LEFT JOIN animal_categories ac ON ac.id = a.categoryId
LEFT JOIN ration_plans rp ON rp.categoryId = a.categoryId AND rp.isActive = 1 AND rp.deletedAt IS NULL
LEFT JOIN feed_items fi ON fi.id = rp.feedItemId
LEFT JOIN feed_item_price_history ph ON ph.feedItemId = fi.id
WHERE a.categoryId = 5
ORDER BY a.id, ph.effectiveDate DESC;
